trust.notes: Imported from the upstream README, CONTRIBUTING.md, `SECURITY.md`, the organization security policy, `Cargo.toml`, `pyproject.toml`, and CI workflows. `repo.build` follows the dev-binaries workflow command for producing the `uv` and `uvx` binaries. `repo.test` normalizes the contributor guide's nextest recommendation and the CI matrix into a simpler workspace-level default, rather than encoding the full feature and environment matrix. No CODEOWNERS file was present in the crawled snapshot. Not maintainer-verified.
